atomic_propositions.standby: True when the pilot is in control of the vehicle
atomic_propositions.apfail: Failure indication from an external source
atomic_propositions.supported: Indication of general health of system, must be True to enable operation
atomic_propositions.mode: Indication from autopilot on current mode of operation.
atomic_propositions.request: Secondary indication from autopilot on current mode of operation.
atomic_propositions.limits: External indication to sensor on faulty condition impeding safe operation.
atomic_propositions.good: False indicates an unsafe situation where a hazard may exist
